Name: Chief Corewright Kasreth
Summary: Arcane control fight with beam shutdowns, puddle baiting, and absorb-heavy detonations.
Description:
[Phase 1] Never cross Leyline Array unless you have Reflux Charge, in which case you step into intersections to disable as many beams as possible.
[Phase 2] Bait Flux Collapse and Corespark Detonation puddles to the room edge, and prepare healer cooldowns for the detonation hit plus healing absorb.
[Phase 3] Tanks remember the boss deals Arcane Zap instead of normal melee, so mitigation must cover frequent magic hits while movement keeps the grid manageable.

Name: Corewarden Nysarra
Summary: Void miniboss fight with debuffed players, dangerous summoned adds, and burst-vulnerable phases.
Description:
[Phase 1] Eclipsing Step targets spread cleanly so its hit and DoT never cleave nearby allies.
[Phase 2] On Null Vanguard, interrupt Nullify, point Dreadflail's Void Lash away from the group, and kill the add pack before it overruns the arena.
[Phase 3] Tanks hold a defensive for Umbral Lash while the group pushes the Lightscar Flare damage window once adds are under control.

Name: Lothraxion
Summary: Image-management final boss with permanent puddles, targeted bursts, and roaming clone hazards.
Description:
[Phase 1] Tanks use defensives for Searing Rend and drop its permanent puddles where future movement will stay clear.
[Phase 2] Brilliant Dispersion targets spread, use personals for the DoT, and then avoid every Fractured Image they leave behind.
[Phase 3] Watch for clone Flicker dashes and Mirrored Rend proximity hits, because the room gets harder the longer puddles and images stack up.
